heading: Availability of Department of Agriculture funds for temporary employment
label: 2225d Availability of Department of Agriculture funds for temporary employment
text: On and after , funds appropriated by this or any other Appropriations Act to the Department of Agriculture (excluding the Forest Service) shall be available for employment pursuant to the second sentence of and .November 10, 2005section 2225 of this titlesection 3109 of title 5
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in the following prior appropriation acts:, , .Pub. L. 108–447, div.
